channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Exit left coming out of tunnel, 6th June
item.description:
Bushes blocking view off oncoming traffic when at crossing very dangerous
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lower Road, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cardboard left by bin, 6th June
item.description:
Cardboard left by bin

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 64, Forest Hill Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped blue car, 6th June
item.description:
Dumped blue car front & back number plates removed
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Worsley Bridge Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown trees, branches hanging down on cars and pedestrians paths, 6th June
item.description:
Really low branches especially when it rains and get heavier, needs pruning, scratching against roof of cars
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cromwell Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree interfering with phone lines, 6th June
item.description:
Hi, my tree on the pavement has grown so much, I think it is interfering with the telephone lines, in these winds, it could cause a problem.,!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hythe Avenue, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped bed base full of rubbish ,bed base and other rubbish, 6th June
item.description:
This rubbish has been there for three weeks and also a dumped old Royal Mail truck been there for 4 months

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harrier Mews, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside Oakley Square Bike Store., 6th June
item.description:
There is no option for Port bikes on your website but this one has been abandoned on our street for over 4 months now. Please could it be removed, it is now a safety hazard. I tried to upload a photo but fixmystreet is not accepting jpegs. There are no contact details for port their website.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 52, Oakley Square, Somers Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: NO Drainage, 6th June
item.description:
Heavy rains creates big puddles and no drainage means water does not get removed. It makes the road innaccessible. The road is elevated and brings all the water to this deadpoint with no remedy.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 59, Hood Avenue, Poverest, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Emergency access gate unable to be unlocked, 6th June
item.description:
The emergency access gate from West Heath onto Woolwich Rd seems padlocked and LAS crews directed to take that as a shortcut are unable to open it, having then to reverse and fly down Amberley Rd instead. It's causing delays while they try to unlock it, then reversing. I expected they'd have reported it themselves but I still see ambulances stuck.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): West Heath Road, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside St Matthews Lodge by Bike store, 6th June
item.description:
Abandoned Port Bike next to Oakley Square bike store (no options for Port Bike on fixmystreet but there are a lot - also tried to upload Jpeg website would not let me). This bike has been on Oakley Square for 4 months now. We have tried contacting https://port.app/ but have had no reply. Please remove it before it becomes a safety issue.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 52, Oakley Square, Somers Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over grown stinging nettles, 6th June
item.description:
Many children walk through the alley way on journey to and from school. The nettles and brambles are dangerous. Children are being stung. Only way to walk through is to walk single file against the fence to prevent stings as there is too much shrubbery blocking half the walkway.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Maylands Drive, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 5 Inkerman (on Alma St), 6th June
item.description:
The new bike hangar doesn't open without hitting the tree and already damaging it
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Inkerman Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Residents parking times insufficent, 6th June
item.description:
Residents parking needs extending to all day and weekends
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clock House Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree overgrown, 6th June
item.description:
Tree overgrown affecting path and highway reducing car parking. Maintain it or cut it down
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clock House Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen branch, 6th June
item.description:
Fallen branch obstructing road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crockenhill Road, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: DoorsX2 & cabinet, 6th June
item.description:
Two wooden doors & a medicine cabinet. Please collect . This is in Barry road opposite Nisa .

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 147, Barry Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Carpet flytipped on street been there for over a week, 6th June
item.description:
Carpet flytipped on street been there for over a week

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mottingham Road, Coldharbour, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hamilton Road SE27 opposite side of the road to house, 6th June
item.description:
Hamilton Road SE27 opposite side of the road to house number 129 Hamilton Road is the plain brick wall of Hamilton Road Industrial Estate. Said wall graffiti tagged. Please forward fixmystreet.com link to your contractor for reporting pin &, picture.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hamilton Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garbage on street, 6th June
item.description:
Lots of waste on pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Creek Road, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken pavement &edging, 6th June
item.description:
The pavement tiles are broken and damaged and the edging is falling apart

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mundania Road, Nunhead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
